name: add-analysis-metric
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Adding new aggregated metrics to build_subtests_df() or tier_summary(). Use when: (1) a new nullable per-run column exists in build_runs_df() that needs mean/median/std rollup at subtest/tier level, (2) extending the analysis layer for Table_CFP or similar comparison tables, (3) updating conftest.py fixtures after adding production aggregation columns.
